Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************************

 Pullbacks from the Grothendieck construction

 We show that the following square is a pullback square

    ∫ G₁ ⟶ ∫ G₂
      |       |
      V       V
      C₁ ⟶   C₂

 *******************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.TotalCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.Projection.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.IsosInTotal.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section PullbackFromTotal.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : setcategory}
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {G₁ : C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory}
          {G₂ : C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory}
          (α : G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂)
          (Hα : is_nat_z_iso α).

  Let αiso : nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂) := α ,, Hα.
  Let αinv : F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁ := nat_z_iso_inv αiso.

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y: pr1 (G₂ (F x))
pr1 (α x) (pr1 (αinv x) y) = y

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y: pr1 (G₂ (F x))
pr1 (α x) (pr1 (αinv x) y) = y

    exact (maponpaths
             (λ z, pr11 z y)
             (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x))).
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₂ (F x))
f: pr1 (G₂ (F x)) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 (α x)) (# (pr1 (αinv x)) f) =
idtoiso (α_iso_α_inv x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_iso_α_inv x y₂)

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₂ (F x))
f: pr1 (G₂ (F x)) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 (α x)) (# (pr1 (αinv x)) f) =
idtoiso (α_iso_α_inv x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_iso_α_inv x y₂)

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₂ (F x))
f: pr1 (G₂ (F x)) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x)) y₁) · f
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x)) y₂) =
idtoiso (α_iso_α_inv x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_iso_α_inv x y₂)

    apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso_comp.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y: pr1 (G₁ x)
pr1 (αinv x) (pr1 (α x) y) = y

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y: pr1 (G₁ x)
pr1 (αinv x) (pr1 (α x) y) = y

    exact (maponpaths
             (λ z, pr11 z y)
             (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x))).
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₁ x)
f: pr1 (G₁ x) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 (αinv x)) (# (pr1 (α x)) f) =
idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso x y₂)

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₁ x)
f: pr1 (G₁ x) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 (αinv x)) (# (pr1 (α x)) f) =
idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso x y₂)

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: pr1 (G₁ x)
f: pr1 (G₁ x) ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x)) y₁) · f
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso αiso x)) y₂) =
idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso x y₁) · f
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso x y₂)

    apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso_comp.
  Qed.

  Section PbMor.
    Context {C₀ : setcategory}
            (P₁ : C₀ ⟶ C₁)
            (P₂ : C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂)
            (β : P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
            (Hβ : is_nat_z_iso β).

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
  ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
  ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                ((F ∙ G₂) (P₁ x)) 
                (G₁ (P₁ y)), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): (λ z : ∑
       F0 : functor_data 
              ((F ∙ G₂) (P₁ x)) 
              (G₁ (P₁ y)), 
       is_functor F0,
 (pr11 z)
   ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ f) · αinv (P₁ y)) =
(λ z : ∑
       F0 : functor_data 
              ((F ∙ G₂) (P₁ x)) 
              (G₁ (P₁ y)), 
       is_functor F0,
 (pr11 z)
   ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (αinv (P₁ x) · # G₁ (# P₁ f))
pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
  ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (P₁ x))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (P₁ y))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
# G₁ (# P₁ f)
  (αinv (P₁ x)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
  ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (P₁ x))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (P₁ y))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
# G₁ (# P₁ f)
  (αinv (P₁ x)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (P₁ x))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (P₁ y))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
# G₁ (# P₁ f)
  (αinv (P₁ x)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
  ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))) =
pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (P₁ x))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (P₁ y))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
# G₁ (# P₁ f)
  (αinv (P₁ x)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
(pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x) · # F (# P₁ f)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (P₁ x))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (P₁ y))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ x) (P₁ y) (# P₁ f)): αinv (P₁ y)
  (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ f))
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) =
# G₁ (# P₁ f)
  (αinv (P₁ x)
     ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
pr1
  (# G₂
     (# (P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂) f
      · nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) y)) (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))

      exact (maponpaths
               (λ z, pr11 z (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (functor_comp G₂ _ _)).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
∏ a b : C₀,
C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
  ⟦ (λ x : C₀,
     P₁ x,,
     (let X := pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in
      X0
        (let X1 := pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))) in
         let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2 (pr2 (P₂ x))))) a,
  (λ x : C₀,
   P₁ x,,
   (let X := pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in
    X0
      (let X1 := pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))) in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2 (pr2 (P₂ x))))) b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
G₁ (P₁ y)
⟦ pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
    (pr2
       (P₁ x,,
        (pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
          ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))),
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) ⟧

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ f))
  (pr2
     (P₁ x,,
      (pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
        ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
pr1 (αinv (P₁ y))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

        exact (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f).
    Defined.

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr2
  (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (identity x)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁
            ⟦ pr1
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data
                   x),
            pr1
              (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)
            ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)))
     ?p)
· pr2
    (identity (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x))

  (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (identity x)) =

 apply functor_id.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

x: C₀
pr2
  (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (identity x)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁
            ⟦ pr1
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data
                   x),
            pr1
              (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)
            ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)))
     (functor_id P₁ x))
· pr2
    (identity (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x))
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x)))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
       (pr2 (# P₂ (identity x)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_id P₁ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x)))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
       (pr2 (# P₂ (identity x)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_id P₁ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x)))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁

β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr2 (# P₂ (identity x)) = ?t2

            exact (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2 (functor_id P₂ x)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x)))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ x) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_id P₂ x)))
        · pr2 (identity (P₂ x)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_id P₁ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
?t2 =
# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ x)))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ x) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (functor_id P₂ x)) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id G₂ (pr1 (P₂ x)))
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

            apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (P₁ x))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ x))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ x)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
                (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                   (functor_id P₂ x)) @
              eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id G₂ (pr1 (P₂ x)))
                (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_id P₁ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

· pr1

       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z)
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
        (functor_id P₁ x) @
      eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id G₁ (P₁ x))
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =

  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (identity x) @

               pr1 (# G₂ z) (pr2 (P₂ x)))

                 (functor_id P₂ x)) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id G₂ (pr1 (P₂ x)))
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

          apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
functor_compax total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (f · g) =
# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data f
· # total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data g

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (f · g)) =
pr1
  (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data f
   · # total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data g)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (f · g)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : C₁
             ⟦ pr1
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data
                    x),
             pr1
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data z)
             ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)))
     ?p)
· pr2
    (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data f
     · # total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data g)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (f · g)) =
pr1
  (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data f
   · # total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data g)
 apply functor_comp.

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data (f · g)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : C₁
             ⟦ pr1
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data
                    x),
             pr1
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data z)
             ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data x)))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr2
    (# total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data f
     · # total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_data g)

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ (f · g)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
        · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
            (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
               (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))
      · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ g)))))

· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ (f · g)))) =

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· (pr1

        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
        · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
            (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
               (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))
      · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))

           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       ((let X :=
           λ H : pr1
                   (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f) · pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
                 pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                   (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
                      (pr2 (P₂ x))), pr1 (idtoiso H)
           in
         X
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
     · # (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z))) (pr2 (# P₂ g))) = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
     ((let X :=
         λ H : pr1
                 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f) · pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                 (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
               pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                 (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x))), pr1 (idtoiso H) in
       X
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
               (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · # (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z))) (pr2 (# P₂ g))) = ?t2

            apply functor_comp.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
   · (# (αinv (P₁ z))
        (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           ((let X :=
               λ H : pr1
                       (# G₂
                          (pr1 (# P₂ f) · pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                       (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
                     pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))
                       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
                          (pr2 (P₂ x))),
               pr1 (idtoiso H) in
             X
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                     (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
            · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g))))
                (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
      · # (αinv (P₁ z))
          (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z))) (pr2 (# P₂ g))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
        · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
            (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
               (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))
      · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ g)))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                      ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
   · (# (αinv (P₁ z))
        (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (eq_in_set_fiber
                    (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                       (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
            · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g))))
                (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
      · # (αinv (P₁ z))
          (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z))) (pr2 (# P₂ g))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
        · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
            (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
               (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))
      · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ g)))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z))) (pr2 (# P₂ g))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))
· # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ z)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))) (pr2 (# P₂ g)))

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))

       (idtoiso

             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))

       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))

       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))

         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
     (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
              (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))) =

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' =
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))

              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                    (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g))))
             (pr2 (# P₂ f))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

· # (αinv (P₁ z))

       (idtoiso

              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· pr1

       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1

       (eq_in_set_fiber

· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))

       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· pr1

       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (functor_comp P₂ f g)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =
?b

  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))

              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (functor_comp P₂ f g))))))
· pr1

       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))

             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                   (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
         (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

· pr1

          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))

· # (pr1 (# G₁ (# P₁ g)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
     · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))

· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))

            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?y'

  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,

        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1

  (maponpaths

        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))

     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =
