C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y'0 =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z0)
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
     (functor_comp P₁ f g))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

              apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                       _
                       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g)) _)).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z0)
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
        (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z0)
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
        (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
        ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
           ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     (_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g)) _)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· # (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· # (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· # (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· # (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
  (# (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?t2

            exact (!path_functor_mor_left
                     ((nat_trans_ax αinv _ _ (# P₁ g)))
                     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))) = 
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z0)
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
         (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
         ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
            ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     ((_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g)) _) @ _)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1 (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat _ (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (# P₁ g) · αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ g)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ g)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ g)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ g)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) =
?y'

# (αinv (P₁ z))

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (# G₂ (# F (# P₁ g)))
  (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))) = ?t20

              exact (path_functor_mor_right
                       (!functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g))
                        @ maponpaths
                            (λ q, # G₂ q)
                            (!(nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β ,, Hβ)) _ _ g))
                       @ functor_comp G₂ _ _)
                       (pr2 (# P₂ f))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ q : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
           (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y
                z g) @
         functor_comp G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (# G₂
          (# (P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
       (pr2 (# P₂ f))
   · idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                 (# F (# P₁ g)) @
             maponpaths
               (λ q : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                # G₂ q)
               (! nat_trans_ax
                    (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
             functor_comp G₂
               (# (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) g)
               (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
            (pr2 (P₂ y)))) = ?t2

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ q : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
           (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y
                z g) @
         functor_comp G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (# G₂
          (# (P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
       (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                 (# F (# P₁ g)) @
             maponpaths
               (λ q : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                # G₂ q)
               (! nat_trans_ax
                    (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @

               (# (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) g)
               (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
            (pr2 (P₂ y)))) = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ q : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)

                z g) @
         functor_comp G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
