   · # (# G₂
          (# (P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
       (pr2 (# P₂ f))) = ?y'

            apply functor_comp.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (idtoiso
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (# G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g)
           · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (idtoiso
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (idtoiso
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (# G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g)
           · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (idtoiso
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (idtoiso
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (# G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g)
           · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (idtoiso
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (idtoiso
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (# (# G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g)
           · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · # (αinv (P₁ z))
       (idtoiso
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y))))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ q : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
           (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y
                z g) @
         functor_comp G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?t2 =
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (# F (# P₁ g)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ q : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
           (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y
                z g) @
         functor_comp G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (P₁ z))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                  (# F (# P₁ g)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ q : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                 # G₂ q)
                (! nat_trans_ax
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
              functor_comp G₂
                (# (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) g)
                (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z0)
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
          (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
          ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
             ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                  (# F (# P₁ g)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ q : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                 # G₂ q)
                (! nat_trans_ax
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
              functor_comp G₂
                (# (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) g)
                (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     (((_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ _ _) _) @ _) @ _)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (...))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂
          (# (P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
       (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                 (# F (# P₁ g)) @
             maponpaths
               (λ q : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                # G₂ q)
               (! nat_trans_ax
                    (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
             functor_comp G₂
               (# (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) g)
               (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
            (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (# (αinv (P₁ z))
        (idtoiso
           (! path_functor_ob
                (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                     (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ q : C₂
                          ⟦ (P₂
                             ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                    # G₂ q)
                   (! nat_trans_ax
                        (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                 functor_comp G₂
                   (# (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) g)
                   (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                (pr2 (P₂ y))))
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (path_functor_ob
                (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z)
                   (# P₁ g))
                (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
              total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (# (αinv (P₁ z))
        (idtoiso
           (! path_functor_ob
                (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                     (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ q : C₂
                          ⟦ (P₂
                             ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                    # G₂ q)
                   (! nat_trans_ax
                        (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                 functor_comp G₂
                   (# (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) g)
                   (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                (pr2 (P₂ y))))
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (path_functor_ob
                (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z)
                   (# P₁ g))
                (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
              total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (# (αinv (P₁ z))
        (idtoiso
           (! path_functor_ob
                (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                     (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ q : C₂
                          ⟦ (P₂
                             ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                    # G₂ q)
                   (! nat_trans_ax
                        (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                 functor_comp G₂
                   (# (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) g)
                   (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                (pr2 (P₂ y))))
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (path_functor_ob
                (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z)
                   (# P₁ g))
                (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
              total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y)))) = ?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' =
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
               (# F (# P₁ g)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ q : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧, # G₂ q)
             (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                  y z g) @
           functor_comp G₂
             (# (P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) g) (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (P₁ z))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (! path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                  (# F (# P₁ g)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ q : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                 # G₂ q)
                (! nat_trans_ax
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
              functor_comp G₂
                (# (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) g)
                (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
             (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (! path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                  (# F (# P₁ g)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ q : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                 # G₂ q)
                (! nat_trans_ax
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
              functor_comp G₂
                (# (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) g)
                (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
             (pr2 (P₂ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     _
                     (_ @ total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                       (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ q : C₂
                            ⟦ (P₂
                               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                      # G₂ q)
                     (! nat_trans_ax
                          (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z
                          g) @
                   functor_comp G₂
                     (# (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) g)
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                  (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           path_functor_ob
             (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                       (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ q : C₂
                            ⟦ (P₂
                               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                      # G₂ q)
                     (! nat_trans_ax
                          (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z
                          g) @
                   functor_comp G₂
                     (# (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) g)
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                  (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           path_functor_ob
             (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                       pr1 (P₂ x), 
                       pr1 (P₂ z) ⟧,
                pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ f)) 
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) 
              (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· (# (αinv (P₁ z))
     (# (# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
        (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                       (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ q : C₂
                            ⟦ (P₂
                               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                      # G₂ q)
                     (! nat_trans_ax
                          (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z
                          g) @
                   functor_comp G₂
                     (# (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) g)
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
                  (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           path_functor_ob
             (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂
        (# (P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
           g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
     (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?t2

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂

     (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (! path_functor_ob

                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor

                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂
        (# (P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
           g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
     (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                    (# F (# P₁ g)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ q : C₂
                         ⟦ (P₂
                            ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                   # G₂ q)
                  (! nat_trans_ax
                       (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
                functor_comp G₂
                  (# (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) g)
                  (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
               (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (! path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                  (# F (# P₁ g)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ q : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
                 # G₂ q)
                (! nat_trans_ax
                     (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ)) y z g) @
              functor_comp G₂
                (# (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) g)
                (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
             (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))) @
      total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq g)) = ?t20

              apply setcategory_refl_idtoiso.
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (αinv (P₁ z))
  (# (# G₂
        (# (P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
           g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
     (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· identity
    (αinv (P₁ z)
       ((# G₂
           (# (P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
          (pr2 (P₂ y)))) = ?t2

            apply id_right.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂
          (# (P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             g) · # G₂ (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
       (pr2 (# P₂ f))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
· # (αinv (P₁ z))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ g)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((maponpaths
           (λ z0 : pr1 C₁ ⟦ P₁ x, P₁ z ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₁ z0)
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
           (functor_comp P₁ f g) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (# P₁ f) (# P₁ g))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₁ (# P₁ g))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f)) @
       ! path_functor_ob
           (nat_trans_ax αinv (P₁ y) (P₁ z) (# P₁ g))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (path_functor_ob
           (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                (# F (# P₁ g)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ q : C₂
                     ⟦ (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y, (P₁ ∙ F) z ⟧,
               # G₂ q)
              (! nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ))
                   y z g) @
            functor_comp G₂
              (# (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) g)
              (nat_z_iso_inv (β,, Hβ) z))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq (f · g) @
       maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
            (maponpaths
               (λ z0 : pr1 C₂ ⟦ pr1 (P₂ x), pr1 (P₂ z)
                       ⟧, pr1 (# G₂ z0) (pr2 (P₂ x)))
               (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                  (functor_comp P₂ f g))))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (P₁ z))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ z)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))
                 (pr1 (# P₂ g))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))

          apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
    Qed.

(pr11 (# G₂ (identity (pr1 (P₂ x))))) (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
?b

        exact (maponpaths
                 (λ z, pr11 z (pr2 (P₂ x)))
                 (functor_id G₂ _)).

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
(pr11 (identity (G₂ (pr1 (P₂ x))))) (pr2 (P₂ x)) =
pr2 (P₂ x)

   ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) f
· total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_data y =

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

  (# (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) f
   · total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_data y) =

     (λ z : C₂
            ⟦ pr1
                ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x), 
            pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,

           ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
                 α) x))) 
     ?p)
· pr2
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_data x
     · # P₂ f)

 apply (nat_trans_ax β).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α

x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (# (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) f
   · total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_data y) =

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₂
            ⟦ pr1
                ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr2
           ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₂ (β y)))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          (# P₁ f,,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
           · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
               (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                  (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
     · # (pr1 (α (P₁ y)))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
          · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
              (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                 (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))

· # (pr1 (# G₂ (β y)))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          (# P₁ f,,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
           · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
               (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                  (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
     · # (pr1 (α (P₁ y)))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
          · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
              (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                 (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))

· # (pr1 (# G₂ (β y)))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          (# P₁ f,,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
           · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
               (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                  (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
     · # (pr1 (α (P₁ y)))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
          · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
              (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                 (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₂ (β y)))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          (# P₁ f,,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
           · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
               (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                  (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
     · # (pr1 (α (P₁ y)))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
          · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
              (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                 (pr2 (# P₂ f))))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· # (pr1 (# G₂ (β y)))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          (# P₁ f,,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
           · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
               (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                  (pr2 (# P₂ f)))))
     · # (pr1 (α (P₁ y)))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
          · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
              (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                 (pr2 (# P₂ f))))) = ?b
