                (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x))))))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α
             (# P₁ f,,
              pr1
                (idtoiso
                   (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                      f))
              · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                  (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                     (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
           maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
             (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
           α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₂ _ _) _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· # (# G₂ (β y))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
              (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                   (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                      (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
      · idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
              (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                   (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                      (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
      · idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
              (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                   (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                      (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
      · idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y))))))
· idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   _
                   (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (# (# G₂ (β y))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (# G₂ (β y))
  (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (# G₂ (β y))
  (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))) = ?y'

          exact (path_functor_mor_right
                   ((!functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y))
                    @ maponpaths
                        (λ z, # G₂ z)
                        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (_ ,, Hβ y))
                    @ functor_id G₂ _)
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f))).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (identity
          (G₂
             ((P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
   · idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (identity
          (G₂
             ((P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
   · idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · # (identity
          (G₂
             ((P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
   · idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
             (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                     (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
           total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
      maponpaths
        (λ z : C₂
               ⟦ (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y,
               (P₂
                ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                 y ⟧, # G₂ z)
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
      functor_id G₂
        ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂) y))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
          maponpaths
            (λ z : C₂
                   ⟦ (P₂
                      ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                          G₂) y,
                   (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
            (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
          functor_id G₂
            ((P₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
               y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
      maponpaths
        (λ z : C₂
               ⟦ (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y,
               (P₂
                ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                 y ⟧, # G₂ z)
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
      functor_id G₂
        ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂) y))
     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
· (# (identity
        (G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
   · (idtoiso
        (! path_functor_ob
             (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
              maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ (P₂
                          ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                              G₂) y,
                       (P₂
                        ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                            G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
              functor_id G₂
                ((P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
                (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                        (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
              total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (! path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (! path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   _
                   (_ @ total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
   · (# (identity
           (G₂
              ((P₂
                ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                 y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))
                       (β y) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ z : C₂
                            ⟦ (P₂
                               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   G₂) y,
                            (P₂
                             ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
                     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                        (β y,, Hβ y)) @
                   functor_id G₂
                     ((P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
              maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
                (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
                     (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
                        (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
              total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))) = 
?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# P₁ f,,
            pr1
              (idtoiso
                 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f))
            · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                   (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
         maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
           (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
         α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : C₂
                 ⟦ (P₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                 (P₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
          (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
        functor_id G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₂ _ _) _ @ _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
             maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ (P₂
                         ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                             G₂) y,
                      (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
             functor_id G₂
               ((P₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₂) y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
          (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
        total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
           maponpaths
             (λ z : C₂
                    ⟦ (P₂
                       ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                           G₂) y,
                    (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
             (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
           functor_id G₂
             ((P₂
               ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
                y)) (pr2 (P₂ y)) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
        (! α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
             (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))) (pr2 (P₂ y)))) @
      total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq y)) = 
?t2

          apply setcategory_refl_idtoiso.
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (...))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f))
· identity
    (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y)) (pr2 (P₂ y))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
   · pr2 (# P₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
· # (identity
       (G₂
          ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
             y))) (pr2 (# P₂ f)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x)))
· pr2 (# P₂ f)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))

   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))

          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))) =

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂

Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, 
            # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))
