f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
  (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x)) =
?t20

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t20 =
# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))))
  (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x)))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₂ _ _) _)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
     (nat_trans_ax β x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
             ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                   (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
        maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x)))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   _
                   (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₂ _ _) _ @ _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (P₁ x), pr1 (P₂ y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
              ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
                 ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                    (pr2 (P₂ x))))))
        (nat_trans_ax β x y f) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₂ (β x) (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
        (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
           ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
              ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x)))) (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₂ (# F (# P₁ f)) (β y))
         (pr1 (pr1 α (P₁ x))
            ((pr11 (αinv (P₁ x)))
               ((pr11 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
                  (pr2 (P₂ x))))) @
       maponpaths (# G₂ (β y))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
            (# P₁ f,,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq
                     f))
             · # (pr1 (αinv (P₁ y)))
                 (# (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y))))
                    (pr2 (# P₂ f)))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (α (P₁ y)))
            (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_eq f) @
          α_iso_α_inv (P₁ y)
            (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (! functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (Hβ y)) (β y) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ (P₂
                     ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                         G₂) y,
                  (P₂
                   ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                       G₂) y ⟧, # G₂ z)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (β y,, Hβ y)) @
         functor_id G₂
           ((P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
              y))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (# P₂ f))) (pr2 (P₂ x)))))

        apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory

G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α ⟹ P₂

x: C₀
G₂
  (pr1
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
       ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x))
⟦ pr1
    (# G₂
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x),,
           ?H₁))) (pr2 (P₂ x)),
pr2
  ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
    ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) ⟧

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
# (pr1
     (# G₂
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (pr1
              (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x),,
            ?H₁))))
  (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x))
· ?inv2 =
idtoiso
  (IsosInTotal.inverse_path_1 G₂
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) 
     ?H₁)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
# (pr1
     (# G₂
        (pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x))))
  ?inv2 · pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) =
idtoiso
  (IsosInTotal.inverse_path_2 G₂
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) 
     ?H₁)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x))
 exact (Hβ x).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
G₂
  (pr1
     ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
       ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x))
⟦ pr1
    (# G₂
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x),,
           Hβ x))) (pr2 (P₂ x)),
pr2
  ((total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor
    ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) ⟧
 exact (idtoiso (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_is_nat_z_iso_eq x)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
# (pr1
     (# G₂
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (pr1
              (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x),,
            Hβ x))))
  (pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_is_nat_z_iso_eq
       x) =
idtoiso
  (IsosInTotal.inverse_path_1 G₂
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) (Hβ x))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             refine (!_) ;
             apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₂ (pr1 (Hβ x))))
           | ] ;
           etrans ;
           [ refine (!_) ;
             apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                      _
                      (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_is_nat_z_iso_eq x))
           | ] ;
           apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
P₁: C₀ ⟶ C₁
P₂: C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂
β: P₁ ∙ F ⟹ P₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂
Hβ: is_nat_z_iso β
x: C₀
# (pr1
     (# G₂
        (pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x))))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_is_nat_z_iso_eq
        x))
· pr2 (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) =
idtoiso
  (IsosInTotal.inverse_path_2 G₂
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2 x) (Hβ x))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             refine (!_) ;
             apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₂ (β x)))
           | ] ;
           etrans ;
           [ refine (!_) ;
             apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                      _
                      (total_set_category_pb_ump_1_mor_pr2_eq x))
           | ] ;
           apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso).
    Defined.
  End PbMor.

  Section PbCell.
    Context {C₀ : setcategory}
            {φ₁ φ₂ : pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁}
            (δ₁ : φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
                  ⟹
                  φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
            (δ₂ : φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
                  ⟹
                  φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
            (q : ∏ (x : C₀), pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)).

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
   post_whisker γ
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker γ
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
   post_whisker γ
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker γ
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
   post_whisker γ
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker γ
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
ζ = ξ

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
   post_whisker x
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker x
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
pr1 ζ = pr1 ξ

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
   post_whisker x
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker x
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: φ₁ ⟹ φ₂
isaprop
  (post_whisker x
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
   × post_whisker x
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
     δ₂)

        use isapropdirprod ; apply isaset_nat_trans ; apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
pr1 ζ = pr1 ξ

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
has_homsets (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
∏ x : pr1 C₀, pr1 ζ x = pr1 ξ x

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
has_homsets (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)

        apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
∏ x : pr1 C₀, pr1 ζ x = pr1 ξ x

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 ζ x = pr1 ξ x

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x))) 
     ?p) · pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 (pr1 ζ x) = pr1 (pr1 ξ x)
 exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @ !(nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: (λ z : (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       ⟦ pr1
           (# G₂
              (pr1
                 (post_whisker 
                    (pr1 ζ)
                    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                       F α) x)))
           (pr2
              (functor_composite_data φ₁
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)),
       pr2
         (functor_composite_data φ₂
            (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
               F α) x) ⟧,
 # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) z)
  (pr2
     (post_whisker (pr1 ζ)
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
        x)) =
(λ z : (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       ⟦ pr1
           (# G₂
              (pr1
                 (post_whisker 
                    (pr1 ζ)
                    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                       F α) x)))
           (pr2
              (functor_composite_data φ₁
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)),
       pr2
         (functor_composite_data φ₂
            (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
               F α) x) ⟧,
 # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) z)
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : C₂
               ⟦ pr1
                   (functor_composite_data φ₁
                      (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                        F α) x),
               pr1
                 (functor_composite_data φ₂
                    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                       F α) x) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr2
              (functor_composite_data φ₁
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · pr2
       (post_whisker (pr1 ξ)
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
             α) x))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
r:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data 
                ((F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x))), 
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) 
     (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))): (λ z : ∑
       F0 : functor_data 
              ((F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
              (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x))), 
       is_functor F0,
 (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))) =
(λ z : ∑
       F0 : functor_data 
              ((F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
              (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x))), 
       is_functor F0,
 (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) · # G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
r:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₁ x)))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)))),
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) 
     (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))): αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
  (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
r:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₁ x)))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)))),
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) 
     (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))): αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
  (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
r:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₁ x)))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)))),
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) 
     (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))): αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
  (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 (φ₁ x) =
αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
  (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
r:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         F0 : functor_data
                (pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₁ x)))))
                (pr1 (G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)))),
         is_functor F0,
   (pr11 z) (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
  (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) 
     (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))): αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
  (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
  (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))) = pr2 (φ₁ x)

          apply α_inv_α_iso.
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          ((pr11 ζ) x))
     · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ 
                 F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), 
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
              ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 (pr1 ζ x) =
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          ((pr11 ζ) x))
     · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          ((pr11 ζ) x))
     · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

  δ₂

p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =

        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
          ((pr11 ζ) x))
     · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) = 
?b

?b = pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =

         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x)))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?t2

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x)))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x))))
· (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x))))
· (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))

   · pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
?t2

     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))

· idtoiso

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))

        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq

      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))

     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
idtoiso X
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @

· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =

  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))

?b = pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ζ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

            apply setcategory_refl_idtoiso.

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))

          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
identity (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
· pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x) = pr2 (pr1 ζ x)

          apply id_left.

αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
              ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))

· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)

             (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)
