          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)))) =
?t2

?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?t20

        ((pr11 ζ) x))

     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),

         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ξ) x)))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))) = 
?b

                apply α_inv_α_iso_on_mor.

G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

C₀: setcategory

        ((pr11 ζ) x))

# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ξ) x)))
· (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq

      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ξ) x)))
· (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)) = ?y'

        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =

     (maponpaths

  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ξ) x)))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x) = ?y'

# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ξ) x)))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?y'

               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)) = ?y'

G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

        ((pr11 ζ) x))

     (maponpaths

           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @

        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))

     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x))
               ⟧,

        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x) = ?y'

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

C₀: setcategory

q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y'0 =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                  ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                  ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) = 
?b

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),

         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq

      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

     (idtoiso

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                  ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                  ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                  ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                 ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                 ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
idtoiso X
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
                 ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
        α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · (idtoiso
        (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
      · idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
   · (idtoiso
        (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
      · idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),

            pr1 (# G₂ z)

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
· (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

× post_whisker γ

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

  δ₂

     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x)
· (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
ζ, ξ: ∑ γ : φ₁ ⟹ φ₂,
post_whisker γ
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) = δ₁
× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
?t20

· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) = ?t20

              apply setcategory_refl_idtoiso.

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x) · identity (pr2 (φ₂ x)) = ?t2

            apply id_right.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

× post_whisker γ
    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂
x: pr1 C₀
p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))
· pr2 (pr1 ξ x)

    (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) =
  δ₂

p: # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        ((pr11 ζ) x))
   · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 ((pr11 ζ) x))) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
            ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x)))
   · (idtoiso
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
           F α ((pr11 ξ) x))
      · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
          (pr2 ((pr11 ξ) x))))
X: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (pr1 ζ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 ((pr11 ζ) x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ζ) x @
               ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 ξ) x))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           ((pr11 ξ) x)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 ((pr11 ξ) x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ζ) x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 ξ) x))

          apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
nat_trans_data φ₁ φ₂

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
nat_trans_data φ₁ φ₂

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟦ pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ x)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)),
pr2 (φ₂ x) ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ x)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
     (pr2
        ((φ₁
          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
           x)))
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr2
     ((φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
        x)) = pr2 (φ₂ x)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ x)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
     (pr2
        ((φ₁
          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
           x)))
 abstract
          (rewrite q ;
           cbn -[αinv] ;
           pose (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z (pr2 (φ₁ x))) (nat_trans_ax α _ _ (δ₁ x))) as p ;
           cbn in p ;
           refine (!_) ;
           etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (!p)
             | ] ;
           apply α_inv_α_iso).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (pr2
     ((φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
        x)) = pr2 (φ₂ x)
 apply α_inv_α_iso.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
is_nat_trans φ₁ φ₂
  total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# φ₁ f · total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data y =
total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x · # φ₂ f

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# φ₁ f · total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data y) =
pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x · # φ₂ f)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2 (# φ₁ f · total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data y) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x))) 
     ?p)
· pr2
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x · # φ₂ f)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# φ₁ f · total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data y) =
pr1 (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x · # φ₂ f)
 exact (nat_trans_ax δ₁ _ _ f).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2 (# φ₁ f · total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data y) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· pr2
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x · # φ₂ f)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
           (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x)
        · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · idtoiso
            (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
   · pr2 (# φ₂ f))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
           (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
       (idtoiso
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x)
        · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · idtoiso
            (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
   · pr2 (# φ₂ f)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y))))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))

          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))

     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
     (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   _
                   (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ _ _) _)).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

     (maponpaths

         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))

      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @

· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1

     (maponpaths

         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @

        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?y'0

            apply functor_comp.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· (# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
     (idtoiso
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x))
   · # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
   · # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?y'

         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?y'

· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths

         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))

        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (idtoiso

?t2 =
# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x))

            apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))).
