x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
        (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x)))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   (_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp G₁ _ _) _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
  (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?t2

          exact (!path_functor_mor_left
                   (nat_trans_ax αinv _ _ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
                   (pr2 (δ₂ x))).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x))))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x))))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @

         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))

     (! path_functor_ob

          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))

   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob

          (pr2

· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?b

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths

     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))

          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))

                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))

pr1
  (idtoiso

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)))
   · # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (! path_functor_ob
       (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
          (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₁
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· idtoiso
    (path_functor_ob
       (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
          (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (pr2
          ((φ₂
            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
                α) x)))
· # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (! path_functor_ob
       (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
          (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₁
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
           (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (pr2
           ((φ₂
             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
                 α) x)))
   · # (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
       (idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?t2

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
  (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t20

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t20 =
# (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
  (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
        (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
     (pr2
        ((φ₂
          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
           x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (path_functor_ob
     (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
        (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
     (pr2
        ((φ₂
          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
           x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     _
                     (maponpaths (λ z, pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z) _)).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (path_functor_ob
             (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₂
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
              pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
             (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))) =
?y'

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof

     (! path_functor_ob

          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x)))

    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob

          (pr2

                   F α) x)) @

           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· (idtoiso
     (! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x))))
   · # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
            (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
            (pr2
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                     F α) x))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x)) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
            (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
            (pr2
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                     F α) x)))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((maponpaths
         (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
          pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
         (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
       eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· idtoiso
    (! path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
            (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
         (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
            (pr2
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                     F α) x))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z) _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (pr1
                   (# (φ₁
                       ∙ 
                       functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                        F α) f · 
                    δ₂ y)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)),
         pr2
           ((φ₂
             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                 F α) y) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): (λ z : (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
       ⟦ pr1
           (# G₂
              (pr1
                 (# (φ₁
                     ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                        F α) f · 
                  δ₂ y)))
           (pr2
              ((φ₁
                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)),
       pr2
         ((φ₂
           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
               F α) y) ⟧,
 # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (pr2
     (# (φ₁
         ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
             α) f · δ₂ y)) =
(λ z : (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
       ⟦ pr1
           (# G₂
              (pr1
                 (# (φ₁
                     ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                        F α) f · 
                  δ₂ y)))
           (pr2
              ((φ₁
                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)),
       pr2
         ((φ₂
           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
               F α) y) ⟧,
 # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : C₂
               ⟦ pr1
                   ((φ₁
                     ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                        F α) x),
               pr1
                 ((φ₂
                   ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                       F α) y) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr2
              ((φ₁
                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x)))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · pr2
       (δ₂ x
        · # (φ₂
             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                 F α) f))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv 
             (pr1 (φ₂ x)) 
             (pr1 (φ₂ y)) 
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv 
             (pr1 (φ₂ x)) 
             (pr1 (φ₂ y)) 
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))

              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),

                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · # F (δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths

              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · # F (δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
