⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
?b = pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) = ?b

            apply (maponpaths
                     (λ z, pr11 z (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
                     (nat_trans_ax αinv _ _ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y))).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
(pr11 (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x)) · # G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)))
  (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))) =
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)
  (αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) =
pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
αinv (pr1 (φ₁ x))
  (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))) = pr2 (φ₁ x)

          apply α_inv_α_iso.
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ 
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
     · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
         (idtoiso
            (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
               F α (# φ₁ f))
          · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
     · pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))
· idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) =
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr1 (φ₂ y))
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (φ₁ x), pr1 (φ₂ y) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₁ z) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))
          (nat_trans_ax δ₁ x y f) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_comp G₁ (δ₁ x) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2 (φ₁ x))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
          pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      ! path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv 
             (pr1 (φ₂ x)) 
             (pr1 (φ₂ y)) 
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
             (pr2
                ((φ₁
                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x)))))
· # (# (F ∙ G₂) (pr1 (# φ₂ f)) · αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr2 (δ₂ x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (path_functor_ob
          (nat_trans_ax αinv 
             (pr1 (φ₂ x)) 
             (pr1 (φ₂ y)) 
             (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
          (pr2
             ((φ₂
               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                   F α) x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ z : G₁ (pr1 (φ₂ x)),
           pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) z)
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b0
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b0 = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b0

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                 F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
           pr1 (# G₂ z)
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
          (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
             (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
     · (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                   (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
        · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
            (pr2 (δ₂ x))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₂ f))
           · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f))))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f))))) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
     · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
         (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α (# φ₂ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
     · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
         (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α (# φ₂ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))) =
?b0
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b0 = ?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
     · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
         (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α (# φ₂ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))) =
?b0

                
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))) = ?y'

                
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ y))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f))))

                apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))).
              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
     · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
         (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
             α (# φ₂ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
