                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1

    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f))) = ?t20

                
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (# φ₂ f)))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f))) = ?b0

  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (# φ₂ f)))
· (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
   · pr2 (# φ₂ f)) = ?y'

                
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (# φ₂ f)))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f) = ?y'

   · (pr1

              (functor_comp G₂

              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))

        (# φ₂ f)))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =

       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2

        (eq_in_set_fiber

              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),

         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x))

                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b0 = ?y'

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂

              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (# φ₂ f))) = ?y'0

                  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y'0 =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (# φ₂ f)))

                  apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))).

  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))

     (idtoiso

              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))

           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# φ₂ f))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
       (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) = 
?y'

   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =

  (idtoiso

              F α (# φ₂ f))

     (idtoiso

           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₂ f)) @

   · pr2 (# φ₂ f)

              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                    (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
      · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
             (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
      · (pr1
           (idtoiso
              (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                    F α (# φ₂ f)) @
               α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) · pr2 (# φ₂ f)
         · idtoiso
             (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y))))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                    (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
      · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
             (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
      · (pr1
           (idtoiso
              (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                    F α (# φ₂ f)) @
               α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) · pr2 (# φ₂ f)
         · idtoiso
             (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y))))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b0
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b0 = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                    (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
      · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
             (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
      · (pr1
           (idtoiso
              (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                    F α (# φ₂ f)) @
               α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) · pr2 (# φ₂ f)
         · idtoiso
             (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y))))))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b0

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                     F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
               pr1 (# G₂ z)
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
              (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                 (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                    (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
      · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
             (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
      · (pr1
           (idtoiso
              (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                    F α (# φ₂ f)) @
               α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) · pr2 (# φ₂ f)
         · idtoiso
             (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₂ f)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
   · pr2 (# φ₂ f))
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x)))) = ?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?b0
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b0 = ?y'

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

C₀: setcategory

p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,

     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))

     (idtoiso

           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂

                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

          (pr2 (δ₂ x))

              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))

· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y'0 =
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                    F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
              pr1 (# G₂ z)
                (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
             (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
                (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))

                apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                  F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
            pr1 (# G₂ z)
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
           (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
              (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))

              apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((X1 @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                   F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
             pr1 (# G₂ z)
               (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
            (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
               (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₂ f)) @
         α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
   · pr2 (# φ₂ f))
· idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
· idtoiso
    (α_inv_α_iso
       ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
       (pr2 (φ₂ y))) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((X1 @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
                   F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
             pr1 (# G₂ z)
               (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
            (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
               (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x))
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
     (# (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₂ f)) @
            α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
              (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
      · pr2 (# φ₂ f)
      · (idtoiso
           (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
         · idtoiso
             (α_inv_α_iso
                ((φ₂
                  ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                      G₁) y) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))))) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# φ₂ f)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f)
· (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
   · idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso
          ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
             y) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))) = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
           (# φ₂ f)) @
      α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₂ f))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
· pr2 (# φ₂ f)
· (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ y)) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))
   · idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso
          ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
             y) (pr2 (φ₂ y)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?t2

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

     (idtoiso
