· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f))))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)
· # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (δ₂ y))

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
idtoiso X1
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))) =
?b

                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =

         pr1 (# G₂ z)

        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x))

              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))

· pr1
    (idtoiso

             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f))))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
idtoiso X1
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ pr1
                      ((φ₁
                        ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                            F α) y),
                  pr1
                    ((φ₂
                      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                          F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))) = 
?b

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

          (pr2 (δ₂ x))

              F α (# φ₂ f))

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ pr1
                      ((φ₁
                        ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                            F α) y),
                  pr1
                    ((φ₂
                      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                          F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ pr1
                      ((φ₁
                        ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                            F α) y),
                  pr1
                    ((φ₂
                      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                          F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
# (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (idtoiso
     (path_functor_ob
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C₂
                  ⟦ pr1
                      ((φ₁
                        ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                            F α) y),
                  pr1
                    ((φ₂
                      ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                          F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))

            apply pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (path_functor_ob
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : C₂
                        ⟦ pr1
                            ((φ₁
                              ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                  F α) y),
                        pr1
                          ((φ₂
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                 (q y))
              (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ z : C₂
                            ⟦ pr1
                                ((φ₁
                                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                      F α) y),
                            pr1
                              ((φ₂
                                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                    F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                     (q y))
                  (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (path_functor_ob
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : C₂
                        ⟦ pr1
                            ((φ₁
                              ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                  F α) y),
                        pr1
                          ((φ₂
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                 (q y))
              (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ z : C₂
                            ⟦ pr1
                                ((φ₁
                                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                      F α) y),
                            pr1
                              ((φ₂
                                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                    F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                     (q y))
                  (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (path_functor_ob
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : C₂
                        ⟦ pr1
                            ((φ₁
                              ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                  F α) y),
                        pr1
                          ((φ₂
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                 (q y))
              (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ z : C₂
                            ⟦ pr1
                                ((φ₁
                                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                      F α) y),
                            pr1
                              ((φ₂
                                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                    F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                     (q y))
                  (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (path_functor_ob
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : C₂
                        ⟦ pr1
                            ((φ₁
                              ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                  F α) y),
                        pr1
                          ((φ₂
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                 (q y))
              (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (path_functor_ob
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : C₂
                        ⟦ pr1
                            ((φ₁
                              ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                  F α) y),
                        pr1
                          ((φ₂
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                 (q y))
              (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                 (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                    (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
   · # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
       (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
          (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ pr1
                           ((φ₁
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y),
                       pr1
                         ((φ₂
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ pr1
                           ((φ₁
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y),
                       pr1
                         ((φ₂
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (X1 @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F
              α (# φ₁ f)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ pr1
                           ((φ₁
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y),
                       pr1
                         ((φ₂
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((X1 @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
               (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
            (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
               F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (path_functor_ob
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C₂
                     ⟦ pr1
                         ((φ₁
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y),
                     pr1
                       ((φ₂
                         ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                             F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
           (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((X1 @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
               (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
            (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
               F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
      maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
        (path_functor_ob
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : C₂
                     ⟦ pr1
                         ((φ₁
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y),
                     pr1
                       ((φ₂
                         ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                             F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
           (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
              (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))))
· # (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
    (# (# G₂ (# F (δ₁ y)))
       (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
