                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv
       ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
     · # G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv
       ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
     · # G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv
       ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
     · # G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))

        (nat_trans_ax αinv

              y)

              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (αinv
       ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
     · # G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))) = ?y'

  (idtoiso

pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (αinv
     ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁) y)
   · # G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
       (idtoiso
          (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
       (idtoiso
          (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
       (idtoiso
          (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
       (idtoiso
          (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)) = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

x, y: pr1 C₀

p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1

             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),

     (idtoiso

              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))

          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =

  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))

           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1

           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))

              y) (δ₁ y))
