           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso
       (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
          (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?t2 =
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso
     (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
        (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₁ (δ₁ y))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
             (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
?y'

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (((X1 @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
       maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
         (path_functor_ob
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C₂
                      ⟦ pr1
                          ((φ₁
                            ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                F α) y),
                      pr1
                        ((φ₂
                          ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                              F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z) (q y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
               (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
      path_functor_ob
        (nat_trans_ax αinv
           ((φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y)
           ((φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
              y) (δ₁ y))
        (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
             (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((X1 @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂ ⟦ pr1 ((φ₁ ∙ ...) y),
                       pr1 ((φ₂ ∙ ...) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
       path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv
            ((φ₁
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y)
            ((φ₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y) (δ₁ y))
         (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((X1 @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂ ⟦ pr1 ((φ₁ ∙ ...) y),
                       pr1 ((φ₂ ∙ ...) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
       path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv
            ((φ₁
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y)
            ((φ₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y) (δ₁ y))
         (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((X1 @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂ ⟦ pr1 ((φ₁ ∙ ...) y),
                       pr1 ((φ₂ ∙ ...) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
       path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv
            ((φ₁
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y)
            ((φ₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y) (δ₁ y))
         (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
    (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((X1 @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ pr1
                           ((φ₁
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y),
                       pr1
                         ((φ₂
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
       path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv
            ((φ₁
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y)
            ((φ₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y) (δ₁ y))
         (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· (# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
     (idtoiso
        (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (! path_functor_ob
               (nat_trans_ax αinv
                  ((φ₁
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₁) y)
                  ((φ₂
                    ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                        G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
           maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
             (! path_functor_ob
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ z : C₂
                            ⟦ pr1
                                ((φ₁
                                  ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                      F α) y),
                            pr1
                              ((φ₂
                                ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                    F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                     (q y))
                  (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))))) =
?b

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?b = ?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?b

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))) =
?y'

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?y' =
# (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
  (idtoiso (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# G₁ (δ₁ y))).
            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
?t2

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))))))

            apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (G₂ (F (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
         ⟦ pr1
             (# G₂
                (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
             (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))),
         pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ y))) (pr2 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
   # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) z)
  (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr2
     (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)): # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp G₂ 
              (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) 
              (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             F α (# φ₁ f))
        · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f)))
   · pr2 (δ₂ y)) =
# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y))))
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)),
               F (pr1 (φ₂ y)) ⟧,
         pr1 (# G₂ z)
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
        (eq_mor_category_of_set_functor_pr1
           (nat_trans_ax δ₂ x y f)))
   · (pr1
        (idtoiso
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ 
                 (pr1 (δ₂ x)) 
                 (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f))))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x)))
                 (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · # (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₂ f)))))
          (pr2 (δ₂ x))
      · (idtoiso
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              F α (# φ₂ f))
         · # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ y)))) (pr2 (# φ₂ f)))))
X1: pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f) · δ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ x)) =
pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
  (pr1 (# G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) · pr1 (δ₂ y)))
     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((((X1 @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp G₂ (# F (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                 (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))) @
         maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
           (maponpaths (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ y)))
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 F α (# φ₁ f)))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (path_functor_ob
             (maponpaths
                (λ z : C₂
                       ⟦ pr1
                           ((φ₁
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y),
                       pr1
                         ((φ₂
                           ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                               F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                (q y))
             (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
                (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)))
                   (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) @
       path_functor_ob
         (nat_trans_ax αinv
            ((φ₁
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y)
            ((φ₂
              ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
               y) (δ₁ y))
         (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y)))
            (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) @
      maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y))
           (pr1 (# G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· # (# G₁ (δ₁ y)) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# G₁ (δ₁ y))
          (! α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₁ y)) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        ! path_functor_ob
            (nat_trans_ax αinv
               ((φ₁
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y)
               ((φ₂
                 ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor
                     G₁) y) (δ₁ y))
            (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y))) @
        maponpaths (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ y)))
          (! path_functor_ob
               (maponpaths
                  (λ z : C₂
                         ⟦ pr1
                             ((φ₁
                               ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                   F α) y),
                         pr1
                           ((φ₂
                             ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                                 F α) y) ⟧, # G₂ z)
                  (q y))
               (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₁ y))) (pr2 (φ₁ y)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp G₁ (pr1 (# φ₁ f)) (δ₁ y))
        (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
· # (pr1 (# G₁ (δ₁ y))) (pr2 (# φ₁ f))
· idtoiso
    (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof y)

          apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso_comp.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
φ₁ ⟹ φ₂

        apply homset_property.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
∏ x : pr1 C₀,
post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x = 
δ₂ x

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x = 
δ₂ x

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) =
pr1 (δ₂ x)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr2
  (post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₂
            ⟦ pr1
                (functor_composite_data φ₁
                   (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x),
            pr1
              (functor_composite_data φ₂
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr2
           (functor_composite_data φ₁
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
                 α) x))) 
     ?p) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) =
pr1 (δ₂ x)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# F (δ₁ x) = pr1 (δ₂ x)

        exact (!(q x)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr2
  (post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : C₂
            ⟦ pr1
                (functor_composite_data φ₁
                   (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                      F α) x),
            pr1
              (functor_composite_data φ₂
                 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor
                    F α) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr2
           (functor_composite_data φ₁
              (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F
                 α) x)))
     (! q x
      :
      pr1
        (post_whisker total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
           x) = pr1 (δ₂ x))) · pr2 (δ₂ x)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· # (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x)
     · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
     · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?b

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (pr1 (α (pr1 (φ₂ x))))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))
   · idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x)))
· # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
    (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)
   · # (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x))
· # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
    (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (# (pr1 (αinv (pr1 (φ₂ x)))) (pr2 (δ₂ x))) = ?t2

          apply α_iso_α_inv_on_mor.
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· (# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
     (idtoiso
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x))
   · (idtoiso
        (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · pr2 (δ₂ x)
      · idtoiso
          (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
               (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))
   · # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
       (idtoiso
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· (# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
     (idtoiso
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x))
   · (idtoiso
        (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · (pr2 (δ₂ x)
         · (idtoiso
              (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                   (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                      (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
            · # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                (idtoiso
                   (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                      (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· (# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
     (idtoiso
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x))
   · (idtoiso
        (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · (pr2 (δ₂ x)
         · (idtoiso
              (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                   (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                      (pr2 (φ₂ x))))
            · # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                (idtoiso
                   (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                      (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))) =
?t20

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

x: pr1 C₀
?t20 =
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))

            apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))).

· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =

· pr1

       (maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))

          apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.

           x))
   · (idtoiso

           (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
      · (pr2 (δ₂ x)
         · pr1
             (idtoiso
                (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                     (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                        (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
                 maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
                   (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x))
                      (pr2 (φ₂ x)))))))) =

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)

· # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))

· idtoiso

       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
        maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)

C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· # (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
    (idtoiso
       (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
          x))
· idtoiso
    (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
        maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁

φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

    (idtoiso

       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

              
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
