αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?t2 =
# (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
  (idtoiso
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof x))

              apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory

x: pr1 C₀
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x))) = ?y'0

            
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂

⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?y'0 =
idtoiso
  (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
     (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
             x)))

            apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                        F α
                        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x))).
          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁

⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
      maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· idtoiso
    (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))) =
?y'

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
      maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
           x)))
· idtoiso
    (α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
       (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                   (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                      F α
                      (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @ _)).
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
        maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
        maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
            (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
        maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
          (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (! α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
          (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) @
      maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
        (α_inv_α_iso (pr1 (φ₂ x)) (pr2 (φ₂ x))))) =
?t2

          apply setcategory_refl_idtoiso.
        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x)
· identity (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₂ x))) (pr2 (φ₂ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))))
· pr2 (δ₂ x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x)) · pr2 (δ₂ x)

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
αiso:= α,, Hα: nat_z_iso G₁ (F ∙ G₂)
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv αiso: F ∙ G₂ ⟹ G₁
C₀: setcategory
φ₁, φ₂: pr1 C₀ ⟶ total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁
δ₁: φ₁ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
⟹ φ₂ ∙ pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁
δ₂: φ₁ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
⟹ φ₂ ∙ functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α
q: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (δ₂ x) = # F (δ₁ x)
x: pr1 C₀
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq F α
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data x) @
       maponpaths (α (pr1 (φ₂ x)))
         (total_set_category_pb_ump_2_cell_data_subproof
            x)) @
      α_iso_α_inv (pr1 (φ₂ x))
        (pr1 (# G₂ (pr1 (δ₂ x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x)))))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# G₂ z)
        (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (φ₁ x))) (pr2 (φ₁ x))))
     (! q x))

        apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
    Qed.
  End PbCell.
End PullbackFromTotal.
